name: yzmir-llm-specialist
description: LLM applications - prompting (incl. reasoning models), RAG, fine-tuning (SFT/DPO/GRPO), agentic patterns + MCP, context engineering and prompt caching, inference optimization (vLLM/SGLang/TensorRT-LLM), evaluation, and safety. 10 reference sheets, 3 commands, 2 agents.
